DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT ( EQUIPMENT VALUATION ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABARIS CARE, INC. DBA CAROLINA CARE, LLC CARE AMERICA INCORPORATED POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH RE EQUIPMENT , FAIR MARKET VALUE $ 6,200.00, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $148.57, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $6,555.82 DAMAGES, $1,175.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $270.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,001.12, $ 148.57 IS THE INTEREST , SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT .
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED OCT-14-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARE AMERICA INCORPORATED
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-16-2004 CONTINUED TO MAR-12-2004 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
